# Cinebara Docs

> Docs & plans for Cinebara available at https://docs.cinebara.com

- [Cinebara Docs](https://docs.cinebara.com/readme.md): Cinebara Docs
- [Core Observations](https://docs.cinebara.com/ui/ui.md): In many different UI layouts, items are placed side-by-side and then distributed and aligned in some manner. For this layout system, we have constructed some generic primitives that accomplish this and are used by all layout modes, to handle these common behaviors in a unified way.
- [Nodes](https://docs.cinebara.com/cinebara_structure.md): A Node is a thing which may have other Nodes as children. A Node's parent is the singular Node that it is a child of. A Node can not have more than one parent, but it might have no parent at all.

## Core Observations

- [Quickstart](https://docs.cinebara.com/ui/quickstart.md)
